7 #include "FunctionManager.h"
8 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 12:32:59 2012

10  */
11 
12 #include <arcane/utils/TraceAccessor.h>
13 #include <arcane/ISubDomain.h>
14 
15 #include <set>
16 
17 extern "C" Arcane::ISubDomain* _arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain();
18 
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
21 
22 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
23 
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 
27 FunctionManager::
28 FunctionManager(bool fatal_if_unregistered, bool verbose)
29  : m_verbose(verbose)
30  , m_trace(_arcaneGetDefaultSubDomain()->traceMng())
31  , m_fatal_if_unregistered(fatal_if_unregistered) {}
32 
33 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
34 
35 FunctionManager&
36 FunctionManager::
37 operator<<(FunctionPtr f)
38 {
39  const Integer id = f->id();
40 
41  auto it = m_all_functions.find(id);
42 
43  if(it != m_all_functions.end())
44  m_trace->fatal() << "Function with id='" << id << "' is already registered";
45 
46  m_all_functions[id] = f;
47 
48  auto out = f->out();
49 
50  auto deps = f->in();
51 
52  if(m_verbose)
53  m_trace->info() << "Register function with id='" << id << "' : IN={ " << deps << "}, OUT={ " << out << "}";
54 
55  for(Integer i = 0; i < out.size(); ++i) {
56  m_dependencies.insert(std::make_pair(out[i],deps));
57  if(m_functions_by_property.find(out[i].id()) != m_functions_by_property.end())
58  m_trace->fatal() << "Property '" << out[i].name() << "' computed by multiple functions";
59  m_functions_by_property[out[i].id()] = f;
60  }
61 
62  if(f->isParameter()) {
63  m_parameters.add(f);
64  } else {
65  m_functions.add(f);
66  }
67 
68  return *this;
69 }
70 
71 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
72 
73 void
74 FunctionManager::
75 registerOrReplace(FunctionPtr f)
76 {
77  const Integer id = f->id();
78 
79  auto it = m_all_functions.find(id);
80 
81  if(it != m_all_functions.end()) {
82 
83  // pointer is replaced
84  it->second = f;
85 
86  // clone vector (containing new function)
87  auto functions = m_functions.clone();
88 
89  // clear
90  m_functions.clear();
91  m_parameters.clear();
92  m_all_functions.clear();
93  m_functions_by_property.clear();
94 
95  // insert
96  for(Arcane::Integer i = 0; i < functions.size(); ++i) {
97  *this << functions[i];
98  }
99 
100  } else {
101 
102  // add
103  *this << f;
104 
105  }
106 }
107 
108 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
109 
110 void
111 FunctionManager::
112 recomputeDependencies()
113 {
114  m_dependencies.clear();
115  auto it = m_all_functions.begin();
116  for(; it != m_all_functions.end(); ++it) {
117  auto f = it->second;
118  auto deps(f->in());
119  auto out = f->out();
120  for(Integer i = 0; i < out.size(); ++i) {
121  m_dependencies.insert(std::make_pair(out[i],deps));
122  }
123  }
124 }
125 
126 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
127 
128 const IFunction&
129 FunctionManager::
130 operator[](Integer i) const
131 {
132  auto it = m_all_functions.find(i);
133 
134  if(it == m_all_functions.end())
135  m_trace->fatal() << "Function with id='" << i << "' is not registered";
136 
137  return *it->second;
138 }
139 
140 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
141 
142 bool
143 FunctionManager::
144 contains(const Property& p) const
145 {
146  auto it = m_functions_by_property.find(p.id());
147 
148  return it != m_functions_by_property.end();
149 }
150 
151 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
152 
153 const IFunction&
154 FunctionManager::
155 operator[](const Property& p) const
156 {
157  auto it = m_functions_by_property.find(p.id());
158 
159  if(it == m_functions_by_property.end())
160  m_trace->fatal() << "Function to compute property '" << p.name() <<"' is not registered";
161 
162  return *it->second;
163 }
164 
165 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
166 
167 FunctionManager::Enumerator
168 FunctionManager::
169 functions(IntegerConstArrayView ids) const
170 {
171  std::set<FunctionPtr> function_set;
172 
173  for(Integer i = 0; i < ids.size(); ++i) {
174  auto it = m_functions_by_property.find(ids[i]);
175 
176  if(it == m_functions_by_property.end()) {
177  if(m_fatal_if_unregistered)
178  m_trace->fatal() << "Function of property id='" << i << "' is not registered";
179  // else
180  // m_trace->warning() << "Function of property id='" << i << "' is not registered";
181  }
182  else
183  function_set.insert(it->second);
184  }
185 
186  FunctionVector functions;
187  functions.reserve(static_cast<Arcane::Integer>(function_set.size()));
188 
189  for(auto it = function_set.begin(); it != function_set.end(); ++it) {
190  functions.add(*it);
191  }
192 
193  return functions;
194 }
195 
196 FunctionManager::Enumerator
197 FunctionManager::
198 functions(IntegerConstArrayView idx_input, IntegerConstArrayView idx_ouput) const
199 {
200  m_trace->fatal() << "FunctionManager: Unavailable enumerator with input properties";
201  return FunctionVector();
202 }
203 
204 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
205 
206 std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const FunctionManager& f)
207 {
208  nout << "Function manager info :";
209 
210  if(f.size() == 0) {
211  nout << " {empty}";
212  return nout;
213  }
214 
215  for(auto e = f.functions(); e.hasNext(); ++e)
216  nout << "\n" << e.function();
217 
218  for(auto p = f.parameters(); p.hasNext(); ++p)
219  nout << "\n" << p.function();
220 
221  return nout;
222 }
223 
224 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
225 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
226 
227 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
